title: No Fuel Shortage, Govt Assures Amid Hormuz Blockade; Says 53.5 lakh LPG Cylinders Delivered In A Day
description: "Domestic LPG cylinder deliveries remain normal against bookings with more than 53.5 lakh domestic LPG cylinders delivered yesterday," the Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas said, underlining that there is no disruption in household supply.
